name: When We Return

location.name: Khoj International Artists' Association New
location.address: S-17, Khirkee Extension New Delhi 110017 India

description: Opening: Thursday, 12, March 2026, 17:00 to 21:00On View: Friday, 13 March - Sunday, 22 March 2026: 11:00 to 19:00Khoj International Artists' AssociationandGoethe-Institut / Max Mueller Bhavan New Delhiare pleased to announce the opening ofWhen We Return, six curated exhibitions byCISA 2025 Fellows.The exhibition presents the final culmination of CISA’s seventh edition, which brought together curators from Bangladesh, India, Iran, Nepal and Sri Lanka for a two weeks-long, fully-funded, in-situ research residency programme atKhoj Studiosin New Delhi, India.When We Returnendeavours to murmur the aching gap that always persists, representing the possibility of no return, and considers the methods of returning that never quite arrive in their original form, never as they were once felt. As some of us waited here and some of us waited there, all longing to return.The exhibitions are curated byAnna Sireiliu CharenameiEmdadul Haque TopuHengame HosseiniNarmeen SajidPooja PoudelThinal SajeewaThe exhibitions are on view at Khoj Studios, S-17, Khirkee Extension, New Delhi.Curatorial Intensive South Asia (CISA)fellowship programme conceived and initiated byGoethe-Institut / Max Mueller Bhavan New Delhiin collaboration withKhoj International Artists’ Association. The fellowship is targeted at young curators from South Asia whose practice is situated in the field of the visual arts. For more information onWhen We Returnand the CISA residency, visit theKhoj website.
